elements.original_description: A cheerful cartoon character in business casual attire smiles while holding a stack of dollar bills. The character stands in front of a simple office desk with a computer monitor.
elements.image_prompt: A cheerful cartoon character in business casual attire smiling broadly while holding a stack of crisp dollar bills, standing in front of a simple, clean office desk with a computer monitor on it. Professional 2D minimalist flat vector art, vibrant colors, high contrast, pure white background, no shading or gradients, clean lines, playful and optimistic mood, high-resolution digital illustration.

elements.original_description: The same character looks stressed, holding an empty wallet open with one hand and scratching their head with the other. A calendar on the wall shows the end of the month approaching.
elements.image_prompt: The same cartoon character looking stressed, holding an empty wallet open with one hand and scratching their head with the other. A calendar on the wall prominently displays the end of the month date with a red circle around it. Professional 2D minimalist flat vector art, muted colors, high contrast, pure white background, no shading or gradients, clean lines, tense and worried mood, high-resolution digital illustration.
